title: Thales Système 3000 Skyhopper
short description: Thales Système 3000 Skyhopper is the frequency hopping mode of the Système 3000 Modem. Characterized by it's very short bursts and frequency hopping behavior.
description:
**Thales Système 3000 Skyhopper** is the frequency hopping mode of the [Système 3000 Modem](https://www.sigidwiki.com/wiki/Thales Système 3000 HF Modem). Characterized by its very short bursts and frequency hopping behavior.

The Skyhopper mode supports wide-band hopping up to 2 MHz wide. ALE and PSK burst data can be sent using Skyhopper mode.
